payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Dark reddish-brown varnished wooden nightstand with three stacked recessed-panel drawers, decorative top and base molding, and dark metal drop handles (single round knob on the top drawer); surface shows light wear and small items on the top. The piece is photographed from close range (approximately 0.9 m) and the full front face is visible in the crop.
